arts.ttl: Serie A | Napoli v Roma: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the anticipation builds for the highly awaited Serie A clash between Napoli and Roma, all eyes will be on the Stadio Diego Armando Maradona this Sunday. This match marks a significant moment for both clubs, with Napoli currently leading the league and Roma undergoing a managerial change that could reshape their season. Claudio Ranieri has returned to manage Roma for a third time, stepping in after a disappointing spell under Ivan Juric. arts.sum: Sunday's Serie A spotlight shifts to Stadio Diego Armando Maradona, where Napoli and Roma go head-to-head in the latest edition of the famous Derby del Sole.
